app.title: Global Shopping Calculator
app.description: Calculate exchange rates, customs, and tips for international shopping. Real-time exchange rates!

header.title: 💰 Global Shopping Calculator

exchange.title: Exchange Rate Calculator
exchange.info: Calculate accurately with real-time exchange rates
exchange.warningMessage: ⚠️ Unable to fetch exchange rate data. Please check your internet connection and try again.
exchange.fallbackWarning: ⚠️ Unable to fetch real-time rates. Using approximate rates. For reference only.

customs.title: Customs Duty Calculator
customs.alertError: An error occurred while calculating customs.

tip.title: Tip Calculator
tip.info: Check tipping culture by country and calculate

USA.name: United States
USA.info: 15-20% is standard, 20%+ recommended for great service

CAN.name: Canada
CAN.info: 15-20% is standard, adjust based on service quality

GBR.name: United Kingdom
GBR.info: 10-15% is typical, check if service charge is included

FRA.name: France
FRA.info: Service charge is included in the bill, additional tip is optional

JPN.name: Japan
JPN.info: No tipping culture, tipping may be considered rude

CHN.name: China
CHN.info: Tipping is not required, but 10% acceptable at upscale restaurants

history.title: 📋 Recent Calculations
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all calculation history?

premium.title: 🧠 AI Advanced Shopping Analysis
premium.exchangeTip1: Internet/mobile exchanges offer 50-80% better rates than bank counters
premium.exchangeTip2: Major currencies (USD, EUR, JPY) are more favorable at local banks than airports
premium.exchangeTip3: When paying by card, choose local currency (decline DCC) for better rates
premium.exchangeTip4: For large amounts, use exchange rate coupons for better deals
premium.exchangeTimingText: Exchange rates tend to be stable at the beginning of months and weeks. If there are no drastic fluctuations, split exchanges 2-3 weeks before your trip are recommended.
premium.customsTip1: Currently within duty-free range. Verify when making additional purchases.
premium.customsTip1Alternative: If possible, split orders to stay under $150 per order to avoid duties.
premium.customsTip2: Products from FTA countries may have different customs rates
premium.customsTip3: Listed clearance items are duty-free up to $200
premium.customsTip4: Cosmetics and supplements may have additional quantity restrictions
premium.customsRateNote: ※ Actual customs rates may vary depending on HS code.
premium.tipEtiquette1: USA/Canada: Restaurant 15-20%, Bar $1/drink, Taxi 15%, Hotel staff $1-2/bag
premium.tipEtiquette2: Europe: Service charge typically included, leave small change
premium.tipEtiquette3: Japan: Tipping not necessary, may be considered rude
premium.tipEtiquette4: Southeast Asia: Tourist areas 5-10%, local restaurants not required
premium.tipPaymentText: For card payments, write the tip amount directly on the receipt. For cash, leave it on the table when you leave.

about.title: About Shopping Calculator
about.desc: DopaBrain Shopping Calculator combines real-time currency conversion, customs duty estimation, and country-specific tipping guide in one tool. Know your true cost when shopping internationally or traveling. Completely free.
about.howTitle: How to Use the Shopping Calculator
about.howDesc: Choose from Exchange Rate, Customs Duty, or Tip Calculator tabs. Convert currencies with real-time rates, estimate customs costs for international purchases, or calculate tips based on country-specific tipping customs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, we use real-time exchange rate APIs. If the API is unavailable, fallback fixed rates are used with a warning displayed.
faq.a2: Based on product price, shipping cost, purchase country, and product category, customs duty and VAT (10%) are calculated. Items under $150 are duty-free.
faq.a3: Major currencies including USD, EUR, JPY, CNY, GBP, AUD, CAD, THB, VND, SGD, and KRW are supported.
faq.q4: Which countries does the tip calculator support?
faq.a4: The tip calculator covers major travel destinations including the USA, Canada, UK, France, Japan, and China, with country-specific tipping culture information.
faq.a5: Yes, all features are completely free. Use currency conversion, customs duty estimation, and tip calculation unlimited times without registration or payment.
